description_long: This is a modern urban subway train car with a streamlined front cab, painted primarily in gray with bold red and white accents. The train features large, rectangular windows evenly spaced along both sides, providing ample visibility for passengers. There are multiple sliding doors, also highlighted in red, positioned at regular intervals for efficient boarding and disembarking. The roof is smooth and slightly curved, with several small hatches or vents visible along its length. The undercarriage is detailed with mechanical components and a blue stripe running along the lower edge. The overall design is functional and robust, suitable for high-capacity urban transit systems.
description: A modern subway train car with a gray body, red and white accents, large windows, and multiple side doors for urban passenger transport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the streamlined cab with large windows and red detailing.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the train, with evenly spaced windows and red sliding doors.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the flat back end and undercarriage details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the window and door arrangement seen in view 1.
